en: I'm so very proud of you Mike
Wow I really wish you weren't touching me right now You are what loyalty looks like
ko: 와, 지금 만지지 말아줬으면. 넌 충성의 표본이야

en: You rooted out the person responsible for leaking the witness list to Wakefield Katie
ko: 웨이크필드에 증인 명단을 유출한 범인을 찾아냈잖아. 케이티

en: Lewis I have no idea what you're talking about It was almost cute how you hid the evidence in the Gillesca briefs Like you didn't even want to take the credit What
ko: 루이스, 무슨 말인지 모르겠는데. 질레스카 서류 사이에 증거를 숨긴 거 귀여웠어. 공 돌리고 싶지도 않은 것처럼

en: Lewis I didn't hide anything Don't worry No one's going to label you a snitch
ko: 루이스, 난 아무것도 안 숨겼어. 걱정 마, 밀고자라고 안 불러

en: Snitch I mean we didn't even think to check the fax machines That was brilliant
ko: 밀고자? 팩스기를 확인할 생각을 하다니. 천재적이었어

en: The lists were sent from right here in this firm
This is a copy of a fax submission form sent from three days ago This doesn't implicate anybody That's the confidential
ko: 이건 3일 전에 보내진 팩스 전송 양식 사본이야. 이걸로 누군지 특정 못 해. 이건 기밀 직원 코드야

en: employee code She must not have known that the machine recorded it
She Wait why am I being suspended I didn't leak any documents Who told Lewis I did this Let's
ko: 그녀? 잠깐, 왜 정직당하는 거예요? 서류 유출 안 했어요. 루이스한테 누가 내가 했다고 했어요?

en: go please Just wait a minute No no no Lewis You have to stop this I didn't turn Rachel in That's
ko: 가자. 잠깐만요. 루이스, 이거 멈춰야 해요. 레이첼을 고발한 게 아니에요

en: so sweet I didn't really mean to hand someone in
ko: 착하기도 하지. 진짜 누군가를 고발할 의도는 아니었어
